rationale: Elec. Code §253.102 prohibits coercion in election fundraising by corporations and labor organizations. It bears no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: A corporation or labor organization or a political committee assisted by a corporation or labor organization under Section 253.100 commits an offense if it uses or threatens to use physical force, job discrimination, or financial reprisal to obtain money or any other thing of value to be used to influence the result of an election or to assist an officeholder.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and election coercion statute.
